title: Right hand starts: J
description: Letter J — right index finger. Feel the OTHER bump!
text: j j j j j ja ja ja aj aj aj jaja jaja jaja sad sad fad

tips.text: J is your RIGHT anchor — another bump!
J and F are your two homes

tips.target: j j j j j ja ja ja
aj aj aj jaja jaja jaja sad sad fad

character_tips.anna: J is your right anchor — bump on the other side! Two homes now 🌸
character_tips.maxim: Two anchors: F (left) and J (right). Always find them by feel.
character_tips.knopych: J = OTHER ANCHOR! 🎯 Both hands now have homes!
character_tips.klavochka: Two cozy pillows, my dear — one for each hand 💕
